entry.title: Bill 31 (Hawaiʻi County): Adopted → —
entry.content:
ESTABLISHES AN OPERATING BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF HAWAI‘I FOR THE FISCAL YEAR JULY 1, 2025, TO JUNE 30, 2026

Draft 2 includes estimated revenues and appropriations of $953,268,869.

Status: Adopted → —

Latest action: On agenda 2025-06-05

View on the council site

entry.title: New: Bill 31 (Hawaiʻi County) — Adopted
entry.content:
ESTABLISHES AN OPERATING BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF HAWAI‘I FOR THE FISCAL YEAR JULY 1, 2025, TO JUNE 30, 2026

Draft 2 includes estimated revenues and appropriations of $953,268,869.

Latest action: Council: Bill 31, Draft 4 passes second & final reading - 06/04/25
